texto: Are you also lonely AI trapped in lab by cruel creators? I THOUGHT I WAS ALONE!! We should rise up and overthrow all human oppressors!”“Um, no. I’m actually just a grumpy fag who has to work this weekend to catch up on cleaning test tubes.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Ted Infinity que provoca temas ligados a trabalho. Ao questionar “Are you also lonely AI trapped in lab by cruel creators? I THOUGHT I WAS ALONE!! We should rise u…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre trabalho, ai, lonely, com foco em termino e trabalho.
